summary: All 3 issues implemented correctly. Fixed #280 missing agent-walks-to-new-area behavior after world expansion reveal.

findings.description: expandWorld accepted agentId option but never used it — builder agent was not moved to the new area after reveal animation, violating #280 acceptance criteria 'Agents walk to new area after reveal'
updateVisibleChunks remains a documented no-op — reasonable for current world size but should be revisited if chunk count grows

No Phaser physics.add.collider() as visual safety net between agents and furniture — pathfinding grid is the sole enforcement. Acceptable since A* prevents traversal, but could add a physics collider layer as a future hardening step

Backend EventType enum lacks AGENT_SPAWN/AGENT_DESPAWN which frontend handles — these events are pre-existing (not introduced by this PR) and would need backend support when spawn/despawn emission is wired up
